info.title: Dimedove API
info.description: Programmatically manage conversations and interact with your AI agents through the Dimedove API.

parameters.name: app_id

schema.description: The unique identifier of the app.
schema.title: App Id

get.description: Returns the app's active configuration and agent settings.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the app.
schema.title: App Id

post.description: Creates a new conversation linked to your app's AI agent. Optionally associate an external user ID for tracking and set a custom title.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the app.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of conversations to return. Range: 1-100.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of conversations to return. Range: 1-100.

parameters.name: after

schema.description: A cursor for forward pagination. Returns conversations created after the conversation with this ID.
schema.title: After

parameters.description: A cursor for forward pagination. Returns conversations created after the conversation with this ID.

parameters.name: before

schema.description: A cursor for backward pagination. Returns conversations created before the conversation with this ID.
schema.title: Before

parameters.description: A cursor for backward pagination. Returns conversations created before the conversation with this ID.

parameters.name: order

schema.description: Sort order by creation time. Either 'asc' or 'desc'.
schema.title: Order

parameters.description: Sort order by creation time. Either 'asc' or 'desc'.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all conversations for the specified app. Supports cursor-based pagination with configurable sort order.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a conversation. The conversation will no longer appear in list requests, but the underlying data remains accessible from the dashboard.

parameters.name: app_id

schema.description: The unique identifier of the app.
schema.title: App Id

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app.

parameters.name: conversation_id

schema.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.
schema.title: Conversation Id

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

post.description: Sends a user message to the conversation and returns the AI agent's response. Supports both streaming (Server-Sent Events) and non-streaming (JSON) response modes. This endpoint is rate-limited.

stream.description: Whether streaming (Server-Sent Events) is enabled by default for this app's responses.
stream.title: Stream

generative_ui.description: Whether generative UI is enabled. When true, responses may include 'data-spec' parts for dynamic UI rendering.
generative_ui.title: Generative Ui

agent.description: The AI agent configuration for this app.

data.description: The array of conversation objects for the current page.
data.title: Data

first_id.description: The ID of the first conversation in the returned page. Null if the list is empty.
first_id.title: First Id

last_id.description: The ID of the last conversation in the returned page. Null if the list is empty.
last_id.title: Last Id

has_more.description: Whether there are additional conversations beyond this page. Use the 'after' or 'before' query parameters to paginate.
has_more.title: Has More

title.description: The new custom title for the conversation. Set to null to clear the custom title.
title.title: Title

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the response was generated.
created_at.title: Created At

conversation_id.description: The ID of the conversation this response belongs to.
conversation_id.title: Conversation Id

output.description: The list of output items produced by the AI agent, including messages and function calls.
output.title: Output

status.description: The status of the response. Either 'completed' or 'failed'.
status.title: Status

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the conversation was created.
created_at.title: Created At

external_user_id.description: The external user identifier associated with this conversation, if one was provided at creation.
external_user_id.title: External User Id

title.description: The custom title set for this conversation, if any.
title.title: Title

generated_title.description: AI-generated conversation title in supported locales. Keys are locale codes (e.g. 'en-ca', 'fr-ca').
generated_title.title: Generated Title

metadata.description: The latest metadata snapshot associated with this conversation, if any has been provided.
metadata.title: Metadata

message.content: Hello, I need help with my order.

stream.description: Override the app's default streaming setting for this request. When true, the response is delivered as Server-Sent Events (SSE). When false, a single JSON response is returned. If omitted, the app's configured default is used.
stream.title: Stream

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value context to enrich the AI agent's response. Pass the latest snapshot on any message, and the agent will use this fresh context for the current response and persist it as the conversation's latest metadata. Maximum 16KB.
metadata.title: Metadata

external_user_id.description: Your application's unique identifier for the user. When provided, conversations are linked to this user for retrieval via the list user conversations endpoint.
external_user_id.title: External User Id

title.description: A custom title for the conversation. If not provided, the system will auto-generate a title after the first exchange.
title.title: Title

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value context to enrich the AI agent's responses for this conversation. Injected into the agent's runtime context on every response. Can be updated by passing metadata on subsequent message requests. Maximum 16KB.
metadata.title: Metadata

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the conversation was created.
created_at.title: Created At

external_user_id.description: The external user identifier associated with this conversation, if one was provided at creation.
external_user_id.title: External User Id

title.description: The custom title set for this conversation, if any.
title.title: Title

generated_title.description: AI-generated conversation title in supported locales. Keys are locale codes (e.g. 'en-ca', 'fr-ca').
generated_title.title: Generated Title

metadata.description: The latest metadata snapshot associated with this conversation, if any has been provided.
metadata.title: Metadata

items.description: The list of messages in the conversation.
items.title: Items

total_conversations.description: The total number of conversations created through this app.
total_conversations.title: Total Conversations

total_messages.description: The total number of messages exchanged across all conversations.
total_messages.title: Total Messages

total_users.description: The total number of unique users who have interacted with this app.
total_users.title: Total Users

id.description: The ID of the deleted conversation.
id.title: Id

deleted.description: Indicates the conversation was successfully deleted. Always true.
deleted.title: Deleted

type.description: The type of the item. Always 'message'.
type.title: Type

role.description: The role of the message author (e.g. 'user', 'assistant').
role.title: Role

parts.description: The content parts of the message. Can be text, tool call, or data-spec parts.
parts.title: Parts

created_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the message was created.
created_at.title: Created At

name.description: The display name of the AI agent associated with this app.
name.title: Name

role.description: The role of the message sender. Currently only 'user' is supported.
role.title: Role

content.description: The text content of the message to send to the AI agent.
content.title: Content

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
message.title: Message

param.description: The parameter that caused the error, if applicable.
param.title: Param

code.description: An error code providing additional detail, if applicable.
code.title: Code

type.description: The type of the output item. Either 'message' for text responses or 'function_call' for tool invocations.
type.title: Type

role.description: The role of the output item author. Typically 'assistant'. Only present for 'message' type items.
role.title: Role

content.description: The content parts of the message. Each part is an object with a 'type' field and type-specific data. Only present for 'message' type items.
content.title: Content

name.description: The name of the function that was called. Only present for 'function_call' type items.
name.title: Name

arguments.description: The JSON-encoded arguments passed to the function. Only present for 'function_call' type items.
arguments.title: Arguments

call_id.description: The unique identifier for this function call. Only present for 'function_call' type items.
call_id.title: Call Id

type.description: The type of the part. Always 'data-spec' for generative UI spec parts. Only returned when generative UI is enabled on the application.
type.title: Type

data.description: The spec data payload (e.g. patch operations for generative UI).
data.title: Data

type.description: The type of the part. Always 'tool-call' for tool call parts.
type.title: Type

toolCallId.description: Unique identifier for the tool call.
toolCallId.title: Toolcallid

toolName.description: The name of the tool that was called.
toolName.title: Toolname

input.description: The input arguments passed to the tool.
input.title: Input

output.description: The output returned by the tool.
output.title: Output

primary_color.description: The primary brand color for the agent's UI, as a hex code (e.g. '#0f0e0d').
primary_color.title: Primary Color

secondary_color.description: The secondary brand color for the agent's UI, as a hex code.
secondary_color.title: Secondary Color

type.description: The type of the part. Always 'text' for text parts.
type.title: Type
